svg.text: EVERY CHANGE IS PAID BY A DROP
the potential: survivors φ (never rises; drops at every flip)
to bound revisions of ANY dial, exhibit one non-rising quantity that drops when the dial moves;
the count plus what remains never exceeds what you started with. All revision laws are this line.
COUNT THROUGH THE IMAGE, NOT THE DOMAIN
six encodings, three behaviors: revisions are priced by the three,
never the six. Making the map one-to-one turns the bound into an equality.
a count that factors through a map is priced by the image; duplicates never cost.
append evidence = intersect survivor sets: order-free, only shrinking, and an empty set never refills.
THE LEAST WITNESS SETTLES, EVEN OVER INFINITELY MANY
each candidate below the least fitting one dies at a finite time; past the last death the least fit is
selected forever. No size bound needed: the ordering does the work of finiteness.
